revision.comment: new category
revision.text:
{{Portal|Japan}} {{Year by category |m=1 |c=9 |d=7 |y=7 |cat=crimes in Japan |sortkey=Japan |parent=Crime in Japan by year |subcat=1977 crimes by country }}
[[Category:1977 in Japan|Crimes]]

{{Portal|Japan}} {{Year by category |m=1 |c=9 |d=7 |y=7 |cat=crimes in Japan |sortkey=Japan |parent=Crime in Japan by year |subcat=1977 crimes by country }}
[[Category:1977 in Japan|Crimes]] [[Category:1977 crimes in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:1970s crimes in Japan| ]]

revision.comment: use {{[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header|YYYY crimes in countryname category header]]}}, which needs no parameters
revision.text: {{YYYY crimes in countryname category header}}

revision.comment: 3 revisions imported
revision.text: {{YYYY crimes in countryname category header}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{YYYY crimes in countryname category header}}
[[Category:qq]][[sn:1977 crimes in Japan]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
revision.text:
{{YYYY crimes in countryname category header}}
[[Category:11]][[sn:1977 crimes in Japan]][[Category:11]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Text replacement - "\{\{draft categories\|[^]]+\}\}" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude>"
revision.text:
{{YYYY crimes in countryname category header}}
<noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude> [[sn:1977 crimes in Japan]] [[Category:Categories with 1 members]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as Tier 0 category

<noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude> [[sn:1977 crimes in Japan]] [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[Category:Tier 0 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag

revision.text: {{YYYY crimes in countryname category header}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude> [[sn:1977 crimes in Japan]] [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[en:Category:1977 crimes in Japan]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q25058013)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{YYYY crimes in countryname category header}} {{wikidata link|Q25058013}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:1977 crimes in Japan]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TEST1977 crimes in Japan]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1977_crimes_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
